BRA.remaining_blockers: Official product tables would require many-to-many product-to-COICOP allocation.

CHN.remaining_blockers: Official NBS table is a household survey with eight combined groups, not national-accounts S14/P31 with twelve Armilar categories.

IDN.remaining_blockers: Official source identified in probe regroups COICOP and cannot be bridged exactly to twelve Armilar categories.

IND.remaining_blockers: Statement 5.1 is PFCE by item. The workbook supports exact item aggregation, but the strict households-only S14/P31 boundary and NPISH exclusion are not confirmed in this source file.

RUT.remaining_blockers: No deterministic official XLS/XLSX/CSV/SDMX/HTML Rosstat table with 2021 strict household COICOP-HH values has passed the gates.
